entries.name: Telegram
entries.summary: Get predictions in your Telegram DMs.
entries.description: Pair your Vizzor account with @vizzor_bot to receive every prediction, signal change, and confidence shift as a Telegram DM. Pairs via SIWS — no API key required.
entries.status_text: Installed via the Telegram pair flow

entries.name: Discord
entries.summary: Pipe predictions into any Discord channel.
entries.description: Paste a Discord channel webhook URL. Every prediction (and confidence change above the threshold) posts as a formatted embed. Bring your own alpha to your squad.

entries.name: Slack
entries.summary: Post Vizzor predictions to a Slack channel.
entries.description: Use a Slack incoming webhook URL to forward predictions and signal events into any workspace channel.

entries.name: Generic webhook
entries.summary: Send predictions to any HTTPS endpoint you control.
entries.description: Bring your own HTTPS endpoint. Vizzor POSTs the prediction payload as JSON with a signature header so you can verify origin. SSRF-guarded — internal IPs are refused.

entries.name: Vizzor MCP
entries.summary: Call Vizzor predictions as a tool from Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP client.
entries.description: Mint a personal Model Context Protocol token and paste a config snippet into your AI agent. Predictions, whale flow, and signal breakdown become tool calls in your editor or desktop chat. Token-scoped to your wallet; revocable any time.
entries.status_text: Mint a personal MCP token, paste it into your agent.

entries.name: Memecoin Sniper
entries.summary: Bias the engine toward new-token momentum and social signal.
entries.description: Weights social narrative, dex flow, and pattern match higher than the default config. Best for sub-24h-old listings where on-chain history is thin.

entries.name: Whale Tracker focus
entries.summary: Lean heavily on on-chain whale activity.
entries.description: Boosts the on-chain signal weight and folds whale-watcher events into the reasoning prompt. Best for established tokens with deep wallet history.

entries.name: Conservative Trend
entries.description: Increases logic-rules weight and softens pattern-match. Surfaces fewer predictions, with tighter confidence bounds. Best for swing trades.

entries.name: Flow-Driven
entries.summary: Weights live order flow over slower signals.
entries.description: Boosts ML ensemble + on-chain flow; deemphasizes social. Best when you're already in the Flow surface and want predictions that mirror what the tape is saying right now.

entries.name: Helius RPC override
entries.summary: Replace the default Solana RPC with your own Helius key.
entries.description: Vizzor's signal pipeline uses Helius for tx history and whale lookups. Plug in your own paid Helius key to lift rate limits and (optionally) target a private RPC.

entries.name: Dexscreener flow
entries.summary: Use a Dexscreener pro key for live dex flow data.
entries.description: Augment the engine's flow signal with Dexscreener pro-tier feeds. Higher refresh rate, more pairs, fewer rate-limit cliffs.

entries.name: Coingecko metadata
entries.summary: Bring your Coingecko pro key for richer token metadata.
entries.description: Vizzor resolves tokens via Coingecko. A pro key removes rate caps and unlocks additional fields (developer activity, social score).
